seoTitle: Kents Lagoon vs Kents Pocket — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kents Lagoon and Kents Pocket. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kents Lagoon vs Kents Pocket: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kents Lagoon and Kents Pocket.
heading: Kents Lagoon vs Kents Pocket — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kents Lagoon, Queensland and Kents Pocket, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kents Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Kents Lagoon (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kents Lagoon or Kents Pocket safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kents Lagoon has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Kents Pocket scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kents Lagoon scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Kents Pocket scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kents Lagoon or Kents Pocket?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kents Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
